title: Kustomize, Helm 4, Rendering, Validation, Field Ownership, and Promotion · Operations Transfer
summary: An independent delivery team receives an unfamiliar namespace, failure domain, and policy constraint and must transfer kustomize, helm 4, rendering, validation, field ownership, and promotion into a new rendered environment release package. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of rendered environment release package with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases.
Generate ConfigMaps and Secrets from external sources, reason about name hashes and references, restrict loading, and keep secret values out of rendered evidence.
Inspect Helm 4 charts, templates, values schema, dependencies, hooks, release state, OCI identity, install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab K8s Kustomize Resources Patches
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab environment overlay drifts from base, Helm values change immutable fields, rendered resources contain a secret, and promotion rebuilds a new image. Render, diff, validate, pin, sign, promote the same artifact, and retain rollback evidence.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab K8s Kustomize Resources Patches.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compose kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases. For Commit to the mission model · Lab K8s Kustomize Resources Patches, keep K8s Kustomize Resources Patches connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab K8s Gitops Field Ownership Promotion
steps.instruction:
Append the Kubernetes evidence item headed "  # Evidence: k8s-gitops-field-ownership-promotion-1ixht0". Tailor its release-package.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic API or manifest review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run kubectl, Helm, kubeadm, and cluster commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

content.code:
# Evidence: k8s-gitops-field-ownership-promotion-1ixht0
  - competency: k8s-gitops-field-ownership-promotion
    artifact: release-package.yaml
    decision: gitops field ownership promotion
    environment: high-latency edge cluster with intermittent control-plane access
    fault-injection: remove DNS egress from an otherwise ready workload
    retained-proof: authorization review token audience and audit correlation
    case-key: 1ixht0
    change: |
      base: reviewed-kubernetes-resources
      overlay: production-patches
      generators: hashed-config-no-secret-output
      helm: 4.2.2-oci-digest-pinned
      render: offline-and-server-validated
      field-manager: platform-reconciler
      promotion: immutable-digest
      rollback: compatibility-tested
    verify: kubectl kustomize overlays/production && helm template status oci://registry.example.test/status --version 1.4.0
    failure: Reject copied manifests, unpinned chart dependencies, secrets in values, render-only confidence, field ownership theft, or Git history as safe rollback proof.
    repair: Compose reviewed bases, render deterministically, validate schemas and policy, diff server behavior, preserve ownership, and promote immutable artifacts.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The K8s Gitops Field Ownership Promotion structural check is only one gate. rendered environment release package must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
